free_text: Excitation functions for the formation of some
radioisotopes of rubidium in proton induced nuclear
reactions on Kr-nat,Kr-82 and Kr-83 with special
reference to the production of Rb-81(Kr-81-m)
The uncertainties in the beam current
The error in the measurements of absolute
The error in gas pressure measurements.
/By authors/ The total error was obtained by compiling
the individual errors in quadrature. In most of cases
the total error amounted to about 15%. Typical
estimated energy scale errors were 0.1 at 30 MeV,0.5 at
20 MeV,1.0 at 10 MeV and 1.5 at 5 MeV.
Correction in author' list has been done,
